event: message_start
data: {"message":{"content":[],"id":"msg_test","model":"claude-opus-4.7","role":"assistant","stop_reason":null,"type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0}},"type":"message_start"}

event: content_block_start
data: {"content_block":{"text":"","type":"text"},"index":0,"type":"content_block_start"}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"delta":{"text":"Starting to answer...","type":"text_delta"},"index":0,"type":"content_block_delta"}

event: error
data: {"error":{"message":"codex upstream returned response.failed","type":"api_error"},"type":"error"}
